action_text: Open the "Expense Lines" module from the Cost app
rationale: The All menu is open and shows the Cost > Expense Lines module. Clicking this link should navigate directly to the target list.

action_text: Press Enter in the All menu filter to open the highlighted "Expense Lines" result
rationale: The All menu filter box is focused with "Expense Lines" typed. Pressing Enter typically opens the highlighted result, quickly navigating to the module.

action_text: Toggle the "Cost" application group in the All menu
rationale: If the module list is not fully visible, toggling the Cost application group ensures its modules (including Expense Lines) are displayed for selection.

action_text: Type "Expense Lines" into the global search bar
rationale: As a fallback path, using the global search to find “Expense Lines” can provide a quick link to the module if the All menu path fails.
If the All menu results behave unexpectedly, clearing the filter can reset the state so we can re-enter the query and reveal the module again.
